name: Sleigh Belles
recipeIngredient: Package of Angel food cake mix
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Prepare angel food cake mix according to package directions. Divide the batter into three parts. Into one portion, gently fold in chocolate chips and 1 cup of nuts. Into the second part, gently fold in coconut. Into the remaining batter, gently fold in dates and the remaining 1/3 cup of nuts. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased and floured baking sheet. Bake for about 12 minutes. Remove from oven; lift off the baking sheet immediately. Yield: Approximately 6 dozen cookies.
